title: DELETE struct-with-mapping (stale state)
snippet: If you delete a struct containing a mapping, the mapping won't be deleted.
note: delete of a struct that may contain a mapping leaves the mapping UNCLEARED (stale state) -> verify this delete's type has no nested mapping
